name: Twist
description: Twist (Doist) channel plugin for OpenCLAW — poll-based DM and @mention routing.

twist.label: Twist
twist.description: Twist (Doist) channel for a bot account with DM/mention routing.

uiHints.label: Twist
uiHints.help: Twist channel provider configuration. Prefer the TWIST_TOKEN env var over storing the token in config.

token.label: Twist API token
token.help: Twist OAuth token, including the 'oauth2:' prefix (sensitive). Prefer TWIST_TOKEN env var or tokenFile.

tokenFile.label: Twist token file
tokenFile.help: Path to a file containing the Twist token (alternative to inlining it).

workspaceId.label: Workspace ID
workspaceId.help: Numeric Twist workspace id the bot operates in.

botUserId.label: Bot user ID
botUserId.help: The bot account's Twist user id, used for @mention detection and self-reply filtering.

dmPolicy.label: DM policy
dmPolicy.help: Direct-message access control. "open" requires allowFrom to include "*".
